response.justification: Candidate is a Staff Software Engineer with 20+ years of experience applying for an entry-level role. While the technical skills (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM integration) significantly exceed requirements and Berlin location matches the on-site need, the seniority mismatch creates substantial risks around compensation expectations, role satisfaction, and retention. PostgreSQL is not explicitly listed (MongoDB and generic SQL are), and there is no Nest.js mention. The role would likely under-utilize the candidate and lead to early attrition.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience plus full-stack breadth
Bonus alignment with AI/LLM, AWS, Kubernetes, and Docker nice-to-haves
Berlin-based, fluent English, basic German — fits on-site requirement
concerns: Severe overqualification for an entry-level individual contributor position
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed
High flight risk and likely salary expectations mismatched to junior band

key_factors.factor: Strong core stack and nice-to-have coverage
